name: lockbrief
description: Compartilhamento seguro de segredos que se autodestroem

scripts.dev-init: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: npm run d1:migrate:remote && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:private: npm run build && npm run d1:migrate:remote:private && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.local.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:remote:private: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.local.toml
